quick_skim.title: LongE2V: Long-Horizon Event-based Video Reconstruction, Prediction, and Frame Interpolation with Video Diffusion Models
quick_skim.abstract: Recovering high-quality video from sparse event streams is a challenging task. Regression methods often blur textures, while existing generative models struggle with long-term stability. We propose LongE2V, a novel approach that leverages pre-trained video diffusion priors to jointly handle event-based video reconstruction, prediction, and frame interpolation. By fine-tuning a foundational video model, our approach achieves high data efficiency and superior perceptual quality. We introduce Autoregressive Unrolling and Adaptive Context Switching to mitigate temporal drift in extremely long sequences. We also propose Reencoding Alignment with Cross Residual Correction to ensure precise bidirectional consistency during frame interpolation. Furthermore, Event Voxel Density Augmentation ensures robustness across varying sensor resolutions. Extensive experiments on real-world benchmarks demonstrate that LongE2V outperforms state-of-the-art methods across all three tasks, exhibiting exceptional temporal coherence and zero-shot generalization. Project page: https://cdfan0627.github.io/LongE2V-page/
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: video diffusion priors for prediction and interpolation, enabling world model-like video prediction
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 视频扩散先验用于预测和插帧，支持类似世界模型的视频预测
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 视频扩散先验用于预测和插帧，支持类似世界模型的视频预测
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 视频扩散先验用于预测和插帧，支持类似世界模型的视频预测
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: LongE2V uses pre-trained video diffusion models for event-based video reconstruction, prediction, and frame interpolation, introducing autoregressive unrolling and adaptive context switching to handle long sequences.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 事件相机视频重建常出现纹理模糊或长期不稳定。本文利用预训练视频扩散先验，同时处理重建、预测和插帧。提出自回归展开和自适应上下文切换减缓时间漂移，并使用重编码对齐与交叉残差校正保证双向一致性。在长序列上取得高保真结果，为事件相机视频世界模型提供了可行方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 事件相机视频重建常出现纹理模糊或长期不稳定。本文利用预训练视频扩散先验，同时处理重建、预测和插帧。提出自回归展开和自适应上下文切换减缓时间漂移，并使用重编码对齐与交叉残差校正保证双向一致性。在长序列上取得高保真结果，为事件相机视频世界模型提供了可行方案。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: research on video generation for world models

quick_skim.title: CAC-VLA: Context-Gated Action Conditioning for Vision-Language-Action Models
quick_skim.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have become a promising paradigm for generalist robot manipulation, where visual-language representations are used to condition continuous action generation. However, these representations are not explicitly optimized for action conditioning, leaving the action expert to bridge the gap between multimodal understanding and precise motor control. Recent action-reasoning methods introduce additional modules to generate explicit action plans or action-space reasoning signals, demonstrating the benefit of action-level guidance but often requiring separate action-generation frameworks. We propose CAC-VLA, a Context-Gated Action Conditioning framework that learns a lightweight latent-action interface directly within the VLM. Instead of generating executable trajectories, CAC-VLA trains the VLM to predict coarse-to-fine latent actions, which are structured representations encoded from future action segments, and adaptively leverages them to condition the action expert via a context gate. This enables VLM-native action conditioning while calibrating the influence of latent-action guidance on expert action generation. Experiments on LIBERO and LIBERO-Plus demonstrate the effectiveness of CAC-VLA, achieving 98.3% average success rate on LIBERO and 89.5% LIBERO-Plus, suggesting that context-gated latent-action conditioning is an effective interface for continuous expert control.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: context-gated action conditioning for VLA, improves action generation for robotics
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 上下文门控动作条件化用于VLA，改进机器人动作生成
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 上下文门控动作条件化用于VLA，改进机器人动作生成
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 上下文门控动作条件化用于VLA，改进机器人动作生成
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: CAC-VLA introduces a lightweight latent-action interface within VLA models to explicitly condition action generation on context, eliminating the need for separate action-reasoning modules.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 视觉-语言-动作模型因视觉语言表示未针对动作优化，动作生成存在差距。本文提出CAC-VLA，在VLA内部学习轻量级潜动作接口，通过上下文门控机制显式调节动作生成。无需额外模块即可提升动作精度。在多个机器人操作任务上，CAC-VLA的动作成功率超过基线。该方法属于视频动作模型范畴，但未涉及世界预测。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 视觉-语言-动作模型因视觉语言表示未针对动作优化，动作生成存在差距。本文提出CAC-VLA，在VLA内部学习轻量级潜动作接口，通过上下文门控机制显式调节动作生成。无需额外模块即可提升动作精度。在多个机器人操作任务上，CAC-VLA的动作成功率超过基线。该方法属于视频动作模型范畴，但未涉及世界预测。
